TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dai-ni Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Dai-ni a niyaro', 59 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 173 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 166 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 90%, Cou 2%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 2%, Rukai 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮai-ni itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮai-ni a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, ʦo~uo~u~u *%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Dai-ni Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Dai-ni a niyaro', 59 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 173 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 166 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 90%, Cou 2%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 2%, Rukai 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮai-ni itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮai-ni a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, ʦo~uo~u~u *%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
